chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P-S No.214 of 2024 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ Hearing of case/priority 1.For order on office objection 2.For hg of CMA No.6750/24 3.For hg of CMA No.6751/24 4.For orders on CMA No.2190/24 5.For hg of CMA No.2191/24 6.For hg of main case. 08.08.2024. Mr. Nehal Khan Lashari, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muniruddin, advocate for respondent No. 3. Respondent No. 4 is present in person. Learned counsel for the petitioner, after arguing the matter at some length, has admitted that against the writ of possession, issued by the Court, available at Page-47, petitioner had the remedy to file the FRA before the District Judge. Instead of doing it, he has directly filed this Constitution Petition, which in view of availability of adequate remedy, is not maintainable. Hence, he does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed. He, however, requests that for fifteen days, status quo may be granted, so that, petitioner could approach the relevant District Judge for filing FRA. Order accordingly. The status quo be maintained between the parties for fifteen days or till the petitioner files FRA before the District Judge, whichever comes earlier. JUDGE HANIF
